description: Represents the provider configuration of an application component.

MCPURL.description: The MCP endpoint URL for MCP server providers.
MCPURL.title: MCPURL

errorTransformer.description: Use to transform an error before sending it back to the client.
errorTransformer.title: errorTransformer

extractors.description: List of extractors for the provider.
extractors.title: extractors

hosts.description: The list of hosts that this listener expects to receive traffic for.
hosts.title: hosts

injectors.description: Defines injection point for javascript snippet.
injectors.title: injectors

lib.description: If set, this snippet of lua will available in all extractors of the provider, acting as an effective library. It must be a valid lua module. It will be available to all extractor by doing local plib = require('plib').
lib.title: lib

tools.description: The list of available tools for MCP server providers.
tools.title: tools

trustedCA.description: If set, additionally trust the Certificate Authorities from the PEM data. This is useful when working on a custom provider using a self signed CA chain.
trustedCA.title: trustedCA

upstreamUnsecure.description: If enabled, force the upstream scheme to be HTTP instead of https. Mostly use for dev purposes.
upstreamUnsecure.title: upstreamUnsecure

title: AppComponentProvider
